steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Infinitely many solutions means the two equations are the same line — one is a scalar multiple of the other. Compare $3x + 9y = 10$ and $rx + 18y = 20$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: The y-coefficient goes from 9 to 18 (scale factor 2), and the constant goes from 10 to 20 (scale factor 2). So multiply the first equation by 2: $6x + 18y = 20$. Matching the x-coefficient gives $r = 6$.
